title: rhacoma oxyphylla
intro: Rhacoma oxyphylla, also known as Chinese mulberry or Ruicao, is a plant species used in traditional Chinese medicine. It has been found to possess medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Rhacoma oxyphylla include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Rhacoma oxyphylla can be made into tea, capsules, or tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
